description: Kalos bancho-archetype evolution-line 1:1 mirror, within-set adjacency. Pancham (no. 674, Fighting) -> Pangoro (no. 675, Fighting/Dark) at Level 32 with party-Dark-type-requirement 'bad influence' gating. Adjacent collector numbers, flavor-text mirror (henchman/boss dynamic), shared bancho design citation, shared bamboo-leaf-in-mouth iconography (personality marker for Pancham, sensory instrument for Pangoro). Same precedent as wave 19 Sobble/Drizzile and Ralts/Kirlia evolution mirrors.
other_candidates_considered: Could form a Kalos-Fighting-line chain if a future Scrafty/Scraggy (Gen V bancho-archetype counterpart) or future Pangoro evolution-line cross-print acquisition extends the bancho-design cohort. Topology would shift from mirror to chain or potentially anchor a future kalos-bancho-pokemon character node (currently below 3-card threshold for a cohort node — only 2 species). Defer.
edgelord_voice_note: Two card-endpoints, both equal nodes, within-set 119/120 adjacency, designer-coordinated evolution-line. The mirror is required. The sigh is professional. Bancho henchman to bancho boss in two cards. Clean.
